---
title: "Origin of Fermi-Dirac Statistics from Topological Impedance in QCA"
subtitle: "Quantum statistics"
date: 2025-12-01
categories: [gen1, physics, physical]
target-journal: "Physical Review Letters"
status: "In preparation"
featured: false
description: "Generation 1 paper targeting Physical Review Letters."
---

## About

This is a Generation 1 paper from the Omega Project's quantum cellular automata era,
exploring how foundational physics emerges from information-theoretic first principles.

**Target journal:** Physical Review Letters

**Scope:** Quantum statistics

## Links

- [Paper directory](archive/PRL-Origin-Fermi-Dirac-Statistics-Topological-Impedance/)
